# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  resources:
    - name: resourceGroup
      type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups
      apiVersion: 2018-05-01
      properties:
        location: eastus
        tags:
          environment: staging

    - name: storageAccount
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      apiVersion: 2019-04-01
      dependsOn:
        - resourceGroup
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku: Standard_LRS
        kind: StorageV2
        name: ${{ parameters.storageAccountName }}

    - name: sqlServer
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
      apiVersion: 2017-12-01
      dependsOn:
        - resourceGroup
      properties:
        location: eastus
        administratorLogin: ${{ parameters.adminUsername }}
        administratorLoginPassword: ${{ parameters.adminPassword }}
        version: 12.0
        name: ${{ parameters.sqlServerName }}

    - name: sqlDatabase
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
      apiVersion: 2017-12-01
      dependsOn:
        - sqlServer
      properties:
        serverName: ${{ references(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2017-12-01').id }}
        name: ${{ parameters.sqlDatabaseName }}
        requestedServiceObjectiveName: S0
        edition: Basic

    - name: webApp
      type: Microsoft.Web/sites
      apiVersion: 2018-11-01
      dependsOn:
        - resourceGroup
        - storageAccount
      properties:
        location: eastus
        siteConfig:
          appSettings:
            - name: AzureWebJobsStorage
              value: ${{ reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-04-01').primaryEndpoints.storage.blob }}
            - name: MyConnectionString
              value: Server=tcp:${{ reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName } ; Database=${{ references(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', `${parameters.sqlServerName}/${parameters.sqlDatabaseName}`), '2017-12-01').id } }; User ID=<your admin username>; Password=<your admin password>
        scmSiteKind: Nodejs
        name: ${{ parameters.webAppName }}
